case_title: SONNY AU VS. DAVID NEMECEK JR ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-07-2015 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO JUL-13-2015 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT NEMECEK JR, DAVID QIAN AND NEMECEK, LLP TAKE NOTHING FROM APPELLANT AU, SONNY TERMS/OTHER ORDERS: DAVID NEMECEK, JR. IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. THE CROSS-CLAIM JUDGMENT IS ORDERED IN FAVOR OF QIAN AND NEMECEK, LLP AND AGAINST SONNY AU IN THE AMOUNT OF $2075.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS FOR A TOTAL AMOUNT OF $2,125.00. THE JUDGMENT ON APPEAL IS FINAL AND REPLACES THE SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT OF SEPTEMBER-24-2015. PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED
